startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: List of URLs to start scanning for PDFs. The crawler will follow links on the same domain.

maxPagesPerCrawl.title: Max Pages to Scan
maxPagesPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of HTML pages to crawl across the entire site.

deepCrawl.title: Deep Crawl
deepCrawl.description: If enabled, the actor will follow internal links to find PDFs hidden deep in the site architecture. If disabled, it only scans the exact Start URLs provided.
